name: Morphous Squirrel
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible resource planning system shaped by oak park squirrel cues: grey-brown fur neutrals, acorn-tan planning signals, cream belly surfaces, bark-umber structure, oak olive focus states, and curled-tail texture rhythm.
typography: Geist for dense English resource planning UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for compact Japanese labels, capacity metrics, allocation tables, and multilingual operational dashboards.
layout: Operational 8px grids, compact planning panels, 8px component radius, tail-fur dividers, oak-olive navigation, restrained shadows, and acorn-tan emphasis for capacity and allocation state.
